name: Serafis
oneliner: AI knowledge graph for institutional investors — mines unstructured data to identify narrative inflections before consensus. Live with orgs managing $40B+.
team: Ex-Ribbit Capital Head of Data, ex-Google. Previous exit (Kosmos).
finserv: Live with 5+ orgs managing $40B+ in capital. Founder ex-Head of Data at Ribbit Capital ($12B AUM).
thesis: Serafis sits squarely in the Research & Signal Intelligence specialist lane — a knowledge-graph approach to institutional research that finds narrative inflections before consensus. The Ribbit Capital pedigree and $40B+ AUM customer base validate finserv fit. As a specialist agent that enriches investment decision-making, it's the kind of app-layer intelligence tool that would plug into a regulated data backbone for verified source material and audit trails.
